title: Keep markdown docs (README, ROADMAP) up to date after each phase
description: Keep README.md and ROADMAP.md updated as phases are completed. Mark completed phases, update test counts, and note current status/branch info.

title: Phase 3: Gate integration, middleware, Blade directives
description: Register Gate::before hook in service provider, build RoleMiddleware and PermissionMiddleware (with | and & operators), register middleware aliases, add @role/@endrole and @permission/@endpermission Blade directives. 23 new tests, 72 total passing.
close_reason: Implemented and tested. 72 tests passing (107 assertions).

title: Phase 5: Caching
description: Cache all permissions and role-permission mappings on first load. Cache per-user resolved permissions. Auto-invalidate on writes. Build portier:cache and portier:clear-cache commands. Configurable store and TTL.

title: Phase 6: Events & Artisan commands
description: Implement all events (RoleAssigned, RoleRemoved, PermissionGranted, PermissionRevoked, PermissionsSynced, RoleCreated, RoleDeleted). Fire from trait methods and model operations. Build portier:create-role and portier:assign commands.

title: Phase 4: Schema & sync
description: Build SchemaResolver service to read config('portier.schema') and generate permission list. Build portier:sync command to diff schema against DB, create missing permissions, optionally remove orphans. Add --dry-run flag. Fire PermissionsSynced event.

title: Phase 9: Polish & release prep
description: Full README, docblocks, PHPStan level 8, Laravel Pint, CI across PHP 8.2/8.3/8.4 + Laravel 11/12, CHANGELOG, tag v1.0.0, Packagist submission.

title: Phase 7: API authorisation & endpoints
description: Build ApiPermissionMiddleware. Optional Sanctum token-ability mapping. Build RoleController, PermissionController, UserPermissionController with full CRUD. Protect behind manage-portier gate. JSON resources.

title: Phase 8: Admin UI
description: Drop-in Blade admin panel: dashboard, roles CRUD with permission matrix, permissions grouped by resource, user management with search, schema viewer. Tailwind CDN, optional Livewire, publishable views.
